challenges.title: Phone Scam
challenges.question: A stranger calls asking for your phone number to give you a free gift. What do you do?

options.text: Give phone number for free gift
Say NO and tell parents immediately
Ask friends to give their numbers
Give the number but ask for proof first

feedback.correct: Excellent! Never give personal information to strangers! Always tell your parents!
feedback.wrong: Never give personal information to strangers, even for free gifts! Always tell your parents!

challenges.title: Website Scam
challenges.question: A website looks like your favorite game but asks for parent's credit card. What's wrong?

options.text: It's a SCAM! Real games don't ask for this
It's okay because I know the game
Enter card details to unlock levels
Check if the URL is correct before entering details

feedback.correct: Perfect! Fake websites copy real ones to steal information. Always be cautious!
feedback.wrong: Real games and websites never ask for credit card details. Be very careful!

challenges.title: Friend in Trouble
challenges.question: You get a message: 'Your friend is in trouble! Send money now!' What should you do?

options.text: Send money immediately to help
Call friend directly and tell parents
Forward message to other friends
Ignore the message and do nothing

feedback.correct: Amazing! Always verify by calling your friend directly. Scammers pretend to be friends!
feedback.wrong: Always call your friend directly to verify. Scammers often pretend to be friends in need!

challenges.title: Email Scam
challenges.question: Email says 'You won 1 Lakh rupees! Click link and enter OTP.' What do you do?

options.text: Click link to see if it's real
Enter OTP to claim prize
Reply to ask for more details
Delete immediately and tell parents

feedback.correct: Great! Never click suspicious links or enter OTPs. Always tell your parents!
feedback.wrong: Never click suspicious links or enter OTPs. These are common scams to steal your information!

challenges.title: Online Stranger
challenges.question: Online stranger offers 'Easy money - just share your school details!' What's your response?

options.text: Share details for easy money
Ask what kind of work first
Block them and report to parents/teacher
Ask for more details about the offer

feedback.correct: Wonderful! Never share personal information with strangers online. Block and report them!
feedback.wrong: Never share personal information with strangers online, even for 'easy money'!

resultGreat.title: Scam-Spotting Champion!
resultGreat.description: Outstanding! You scored {{score}}/{{total}}! You've earned the Scam Spotter Badge!

resultGood.title: Great Awareness!
resultGood.description: Well done! You scored {{score}}/{{total}}! You're becoming a scam detection expert!

resultKeepPracticing.title: Keep Learning!
resultKeepPracticing.description: You scored {{score}}/{{total}}. Review the scam warning signs and try again to earn your badge!
